mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weak_points_snapshot (user_id, recording_id, item_id, category, label, forgetting_score, recommendation, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordingId}, #{itemId}, #{category}, #{label}, #{forgettingScore}, #{recommendation}, now()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, item_id) DO UPDATE SET recording_id = EXCLUDED.recording_id, category = EXCLUDED.category, label = EXCLUDED.label, forgetting_score = EXCLUDED.forgetting_score, recommendation = EXCLUDED.recommendation, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS weak_point_count, AVG(forgetting_score) AS avg_forgetting_score, MAX(updated_at) AS last_updated FROM weak_points_snapshot WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY category
